basic_details.job_title: NCRTC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager and Sr. Deputy General Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sr. Deputy General Manager/Transport Planner & Assistant Manager/Transport Planner
basic_details.short_information: NCRTC is recruiting Transport Planner Executives for planning and execution of Namo Bharat (RRTS) corridors.

age_limit.details: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner: 45 Years | Assistant Manager/ Transport Planner: 40 Years

qualification.details: Essential Qualification (Common for both posts) Master of Transport Planning / Transport Engineering with B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) / B. Plan. / B. Arch. (Full Time) | Essential Experience | For Sr. Deputy General Manager/Transport Planner (E5): | Minimum 11 years post-qualification experience (E2/L9 or above) in CPSEs/PSUs/Central/State Govt. in Transport Planning. OR Minimum 13 years post-qualification experience for Private Sector candidates. | For Assistant Manager/Transport Planner (E2): | Minimum 05 years post-qualification experience in Transport Planning.

salary_details.details: For Sr. DGM (E5): | CDA Scale: Last 3 years in ₹78,800-2,09,200 (L12) or above. IDA Scale: E5 or E4 (last 3 years). Private Sector: Minimum CTC ₹17.70 Lakhs p.a. | For AM (E2): | CDA Scale: L10/L9 or L8 (last 3 years). IDA Scale: E2 or E1 (last 3 years). Private Sector: Minimum CTC ₹11.10 Lakhs p.a.

how_to_apply: Visit the official NCRTC website and register online.
Upload required documents and submit the form.
Take printout for future reference. Last Date: 17 August 2026
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility criteria as on 16/07/2026. Mere fulfillment of eligibility does not guarantee selection. NCRTC reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: NCRTC has officially released Vacancy Notice No. 26/2026 dated 16/07/2026 for engagement of Transport Planner Executives on direct recruitment basis. The notification includes complete details on posts, pay scales, eligibility, experience, job description, reservation, and important dates. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying online. Download NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NCRTC is recruiting Transport Planner Executives for planning and execution of Namo Bharat (RRTS) corridors.

rows.national_capital_region_transport_corpor: Sr. Deputy General Manager/Transport Planner & Assistant Manager/Transport Planner

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification (Common for both posts) Master of Transport Planning / Transport Engineering with B.E./B.Tech. (Civil) / B. Plan. / B. Arch. (Full Time) Essential Experience For Sr. Deputy General Manager/Transport Planner (E5): Minimum 11 years post-qualification experience (E2/L9 or above) in CPSEs/PSUs/Central/State Govt. in Transport Planning. OR Minimum 13 years post-qualification experience for Private Sector candidates. For Assistant Manager/Transport Planner (E2): Minimum 05 years post-qualification experience in Transport Planning.

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: For Sr. DGM (E5): CDA Scale: Last 3 years in ₹78,800-2,09,200 (L12) or above. IDA Scale: E5 or E4 (last 3 years). Private Sector: Minimum CTC ₹17.70 Lakhs p.a. For AM (E2): CDA Scale: L10/L9 or L8 (last 3 years). IDA Scale: E2 or E1 (last 3 years). Private Sector: Minimum CTC ₹11.10 Lakhs p.a.

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit & Relaxation
content_sections.text: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner: 45 Years Assistant Manager/ Transport Planner: 40 Years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official NCRTC website and register online. Fill the application form carefully. Upload required documents and submit the form. Take printout for future reference. Last Date: 17 August 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NCRTC Candidates
content_sections.text: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility criteria as on 16/07/2026. Mere fulfillment of eligibility does not guarantee selection. NCRTC reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: Who should apply for NCRTC Transport Planner Posts
content_sections.text: Experienced Transport Planners with relevant qualifications. Professionals from CPSEs, PSUs, Government, or Private Sector with required experience. Candidates passionate about urban mobility and RRTS/Namo Bharat projects.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in NCRTC Transport Planner Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 03 vacancies – 1 Sr. Deputy General Manager and 2 Assistant Manager posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for NCRTC Vacancy Notice 26/2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Sr. Deputy General Manager (Transport Planner) in NCRTC?
Q4. What is the essential qualification for NCRTC Transport Planner posts?
faq.answer: Master of Transport Planning/Transport Engineering with B.E./B.Tech (Civil)/B.Plan/B.Arch (Full Time).

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum experience required for Assistant Manager/Transport Planner?
faq.answer: Minimum 05 years post-qualification experience in Transport Planning.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for OBC candidates in NCRTC Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, 03 years relaxation for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for NCRTC Transport Planner Executive posts?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official NCRTC website between 16/07/2026 and 17/08/2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum CTC required for private sector candidates for Sr. DGM post?
faq.answer: Minimum ₹17.70 Lakhs per annum.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Candidates may be posted at any office or project unit of NCRTC across locations.

faq.question: Q10. Is the NCRTC Transport Planner recruitment on permanent basis?
faq.answer: Yes, it is on Direct Recruitment basis.
